SELECT time_bucket(INTERVAL '1 week', event_time) AS weekly_bucket FROM time_data;
SELECT time_bucket(INTERVAL '2 days', event_time, TIMESTAMPTZ '1992-04-01 00:00:00-07') AS bi_daily_bucket FROM time_data;
SELECT time_bucket(INTERVAL '1 month', event_time, TIMESTAMPTZ '2000-01-01 00:00:00+00') AS monthly_bucket FROM time_data;
SELECT time_bucket(INTERVAL '2 weeks', event_time) AS two_week_buckets, COUNT(*) FROM time_data GROUP BY two_week_buckets;
CREATE TABLE user_events (user_id INT, event_time TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO user_events VALUES (1, TIMESTAMPTZ '1992-04-01 12:00:00-07'), (1, TIMESTAMPTZ '1992-04-22 09:30:00-07'), (2, TIMESTAMPTZ '1992-04-20 16:00:00-07');
SELECT user_id, time_bucket(INTERVAL '1 week', event_time) AS weekly_buckets FROM user_events GROUP BY user_id, weekly_buckets;
WITH buckets AS (SELECT time_bucket(INTERVAL '10 days', event_time) AS bucket FROM time_data) SELECT bucket, COUNT(*) FROM buckets GROUP BY bucket;
SELECT u.user_id, time_bucket(INTERVAL '1 month', e.event_time) AS monthly_buckets FROM user_events u JOIN time_data e ON u.event_time = e.event_time GROUP BY u.user_id, monthly_buckets;
